# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository follows Mike's AI Project Operating System.

## Operating Rules

- Treat GitHub as the source of truth.
- Inspect existing files before changing anything.
- Preserve existing user work.
- Do not overwrite non-placeholder files unless explicitly instructed.
- Keep this repository documentation-first until code is clearly needed.
- Update `agents/handoff.md` after meaningful work.
- Update `docs/decisions.md` when a meaningful decision is made.
- Update `docs/changelog.md` after meaningful changes.

## Files to Read First

- `Project_Custom_Instructions_AI_Agent_Standard.md`
- `Project_Custom_Instructions_Project_Context.md`
- `Project_Custom_Instructions_GitHub_Repo_Setup_Template.md`
- `Project_Custom_Instructions_Bootstrap_Mode.md`

## Preferred Style

- Small, clear changes.
- Descriptive commit messages.
- Documentation synchronized with project decisions.
- No unnecessary rewrites.
